case_title: ALBENO REDMOND VS. CITY AUTO TECH, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDMOND, ALBENO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC. $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $415.00, CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RETURN TO PLAINTIFF AT CITY AUTO TECH, INC., 269 BAYSHORE BLVD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: 2001 CHRYSLER PT CRUISER, LICENSE #65EM761 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY REDMOND, ALBENO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED JUN-05-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDMOND, ALBENO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED JUN-05-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LU DANG--CUSTOMER SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
